programme.title: True Crime Show
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders
programme.desc: (M) Joan Giambra is discovered strangled and lying naked under her comatose daughter. The young girl becomes the only hope of catching a killer, but will she remember his identity?

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder In The Deep
programme.desc: (M) A Minnesota man thinks his life is perfect until rumors of infidelity surface. He will do whatever it takes to keep his family from being pulled apart.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder In The Deep
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.
